case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LINH T TRAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-17-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, LINH T $9,749.23 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,039.23, SEE SCANNED DOC
